opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The deep, gnawing pain in my right shin is unbearable, especially at night. It feels like the bone is on fire from the inside.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The shin pain has been building for months but the last two days it's been so bad it keeps waking me and the maximum painkillers aren't touching it — I couldn't wait until the clinic opens.

symptom_narrative.onset: the ache in the shin has been there about three months, but it flared badly over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly three months, acutely much worse for two days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, gnawing, aching pain — like the bone is on fire from the inside
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable, the worst it's been; it wakes me over and over
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my right shin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: always worse at night, and it wakes me repeatedly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I've taken the maximum ibuprofen and paracetamol and it hasn't touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: worse at night, and when I'm up on my feet
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my right leg has slowly gone bent over the last couple of years, my hats have got tighter, I've lost some hearing in my right ear, and the skin over the shin feels warm lately
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the ache has been slowly there for months; I put the bent leg down to just getting older
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm limping badly, worn out and not sleeping

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my right knee has been stiff and grinding for a while

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: maximum over-the-counter dose over the last 24 hours
maximum over-the-counter dose over the last 24 hours

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: independent and usually mobile; lives with spouse who is here and made the call; worried about falling because of the bent leg and the limping

objective_data_offered.value: you can see his right shin curves outward — it looks more bent than it did a couple of years ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/spouse observation over a video call, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: the spouse says he has had to buy a larger hat size over the past year or so
the skin over the front of the shin feels warm to touch compared with the other leg
reduced hearing in the right ear noticed over recent months
